equity.note: Bigger equity drawdowns imply more stress.

title: 2025-07-17 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 9.69
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2025-07-17: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 9.69/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-07-17, the score printed 9.69/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
